creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
-On [20010919 13:12], sobomax@FreeBSD.org (sobomax@FreeBSD.org) wrote:
>State-Changed-Why: 
>Are you sure that you don't have any hardware problem and/or don't use
>expensive gcc optimisation levels? I'm building this package literally
>every several days, both on 5-CURRENT and 4-STABLE, and never saw such
>problems. Please try to look into what could be wrong with your systems.

Our system's awk is also gawk and on STABLE is 3.0.6 as well.

Try: awk --version

-- 
Jeroen Ruigrok van der Werven/Asmodai asmodai@[wxs.nl|freebsd.org|xmach.org]
